title: WALTER HAAS PARK — Studio Green
content: # Studio Green. WalterHaasPark WHP-RENDER (finished).jpg. Walter Haas Park and Playground was renovated in 2005. Since then it has become a spectacular neighborhood park that people of all ages may enjoy. Containing some of the most spectacular views around San Francisco, this park contains a basketball court, large grass area, dog park, and a two tier playground: one for toddlers and another for older children.
